title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Data Layer
intent: Ensure 18_data_layer/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. Data storage schemas, repositories, and persistence logic.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 18_data_layer/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 18_data_layer/

All local gates (Policy, SoT, QA) pass
